'''Kiles L'toth''' was a [[Dornean/Legends|Dornean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the Associate Director of the [[Astrographic Survey Institute]] and an officer in the [[Dornea/Legends|Dornean]] [[Dornean Navy|Navy]].

==Biography==
When two Dornean [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|''Braha'tok''-class gunships]] were dispatched to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] to fight in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], L'toth was assigned command of the lead ship of the class, ''[[Braha'tok]]''. He earned acclaim for defending [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] rescuers from [[Eminence (Carrack-class)|''Eminence'']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]], before it could be destroyed by fellow commander [[Etahn A'baht]] aboard the ''[[Torktarak]]''.

After coming to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], L'toth was contacted by General A'baht, just before the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] was directed to the [[Hatawa sector/Legends|Hatawa]] and [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sectors]] to locate the mysterious [[Black Fleet]]. Director L'toth was asked a favor, owed to A'baht, to send out as many probe ships, or [[Astrogator-class probe ship|flatfish]], to the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] to update the surveys of those sectors. Six ships were sent out to update the [[Third General Survey]]'s findings, which were incomplete due to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The start of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] was when one flatfish, named ''[[Astrolabe]]'', entered the Cluster at [[Doornik-1142/Legends|Doornik-1142]]. It was destroyed by the Yevethan [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruiser]] ''[[Purity]]''.

After the Black Fleet Crisis was over, and A'baht relieved of command, Kiles took command of the Fifth Fleet.<ref name="Hero's Trial" />

He had at least one son, named [[Been L'toth]].
